summary: Diff implements a structured comic panel/part model and updates the UI to render comic-styled panels with distinct elements (captions, speech, thought, SFX, scene labels) and a themed palette. Deduplication is updated for structured parts, but it removes panels that become empty, which may violate the requirement to keep panel ordering stable under repetition removal. Several additional changes (React Query backend hook, footer attribution/UTM, branding emoji) appear beyond the requested scope.

missing_requirements.requirement: When repetition removal is enabled, repeated identical text lines found in panel parts are removed/suppressed while the overall panel ordering remains stable.
missing_requirements.reason: The new deduplication logic filters out panels that have no parts left after deduplication (`.filter(panel => panel.parts.length > 0)`), which can remove panels entirely and thus change the displayed panel sequence/indices rather than keeping the full panel order stable.

hallucinated_features.description: Added a React Query hook to call a backend `deduplicateComicText` mutation.
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest focuses on in-app comic rendering and adapting the existing repetition-removal behavior in the frontend; it does not request adding/altering backend query hooks or a backend mutation integration.

hallucinated_features.description: Footer changes including caffeine.ai attribution with UTM tracking and additional comic creator credits.
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested by REQ-4/5/6; BuildRequest does not mention adding attribution/UTM parameters or updating footer content.

hallucinated_features.description: Added Spider-Verse branding emoji in the header title.
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested by REQ-4/5/6; while branding/text updates were requested (remove “Script Viewer” labeling), the emoji branding is an additional unrequested UI change.
